skills.name: Witch's Icy Veil
skills.description: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Ice.

skills.name: Worker Bee
skills.description: Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch. While in team, Elizabee's stats will be increased.

skills.name: Wriggling Weasel
skills.description: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dragon while mounted.

skills.name: Yellow Tank
skills.description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.

skills.name: Zephyr Glider
skills.description: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.
